normal.reasoning: No irregularities detected. Salami count and placement appear to match the expected pattern.

missing-center-salami.reasoning: Center area appears empty. Expected 2 salamis in the center position, none were detected.

one-center-salami.reasoning: Only 1 salami detected in the center area. Expected 2 in the correct positions.

extra-salami.reasoning: More salamis detected than expected on one or more slices.

wrong-slices.reasoning: Slice count does not match the expected 8 slices.
